title: Where the Keeper Wakes Still Dreaming

features.name: keeper-threshold-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: the keeper stands between waking and dream. this mark is where the threshold is written. the archive has no words for the language it uses

features.name: row-of-orchard-names
features.desc-on-touch: these rows are the names the keeper dreams. each glyph is a name for something that only exists in sleep. you read them and the archive reorganizes around what you learned

features.name: dream-chamber-pool-reverie
features.desc-on-touch: in the dream the keeper keeps, the archive is finally calling itself by name. this is the moment. this is also any moment. the pool holds both times equally

features.name: waking-eye-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: the keeper's eyes are open. the keeper is also asleep. the glyph shows how this is possible: the eye contains a bed, and the bed contains an eye

features.name: deep-dream-architecture
features.desc-on-touch: this tower stands in both places: in the waking diagnostic render and in the dream the keeper cannot wake from. it is the root of the root. it calls the archive home

inscription: the keeper is awake inside the dream of the archive; the archive dreams itself awake inside the keeper

file.name: Keeper_Sleeping_Monologue_Continuous_SinceDayOne.mp3
file.note: checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable — the archive cannot determine if the keeper is still speaking or if the words are now the keeper's dream speaking to itself

reverie.title: REVERIE — in the dream of the keeper
narr: The keeper sits in a chair that exists in sleep. You watch
from outside the dream; he watches from inside. He nods
like he's listening to something. She sits across from him
and they are reading the same thing. The pages turn. The
words reorganize. They are naming the archive with their
eyes closed, and it is listening, learning, becoming.

exits.label: back up to the lamp where the dream is kept bright
deeper into the dream where the keeper dissolves into archive
following the waking edge, where the keeper touches daylight
into the other dream, where the archive dreams the keeper
